title: Add backoff: :linear-equivalent via custom callback
prompt: Write a new worker `MyApp.Workers.ScheduledWorker` in the `:default` queue. Override `backoff/1` to return `attempt * 60` (one minute per attempt, linear). Set `max_attempts: 10`. The perform/1 should accept `%{"task_id" => id}` and call `MyApp.Tasks.process(id)`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/scheduled_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: One-line backoff callback; the only gotcha is the signature (must accept an Oban.Job or attempt integer).
